originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 7acf6cd80b2.c L44: driver_data passed as uninitialized 1st argument. In the UNIX98_PTYS code path, driver_data is used uninitialized when the success path of an earlier call is not taken correctly. PC: CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS=T (CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES cancels). No library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_56 (TRUE_NEW) and TRANSFORMATION_132 (TRUE_NEW).
